zh.lifeSummary: 當Ela Bisset於1226年出生在英國英格蘭戴文特福德時，她的父親John de Biset41歲，母親Alice Basset46歲。她於1241年與John de Wotton I在英國英格蘭素瑞沃頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1276年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾班波瑞享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ela Bisset于1226年出生在英国英格兰戴文特福德时，她的父亲John de Biset41岁，母亲Alice Basset46岁。她于1241年与John de Wotton I在英国英格兰素瑞沃頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1276年在英国英格兰奧可福爾班波瑞享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bisset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Bissett  .
French: from a diminutive of Old French bisse ‘fine linen’ (see Bisson ).

variants.name: Bissett
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French biset ‘dark’, a diminutive of bis (see Biss ).

Altered form of French Bizet: nickname for someone with a dark complexion, derived from bis ‘grayish-brown’. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Bissette .

History: The surname Bissett (see 1 above) was brought to Scotland from Nottinghamshire c. 1175 by Henricus Byset, an Englishman who became a retainer of King William the Lion. — It was Jean George Bizet from Haute-Saône, France, whose surname was changed to Bissett (see 2 above) after his immigration to NS, Canada, in 1752.

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin and meaning; possibly a variant of   Alva .

en.lifeSummary: When Ela Bisset was born in 1226, in Whitford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Biset, was 41 and her mother, Alice Basset, was 46. She married John de Wotton I in 1241, in Wotton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1276, in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ela Bisset est née en 1226, à Whitford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Biset, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Basset, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé John de Wotton I en 1241, à Wotton, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1276, à Banbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ela Bisset 1226 in Whitford, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Biset 41 und ihre Mutter Alice Basset 46. Sie hat 1241 in Wotton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom John de Wotton I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1276 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ela Bisset è nata il nel 1226 nel Whitford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Biset, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Alice Basset, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato John de Wotton I nel 1241, nel Wotton, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1276, nel Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ela Bissetが1226年にイギリスイギリスデボンウィトフォードで生まれた時，父John de Bisetは41歳，母Alice Bassetは46歳であった。1241年にイギリスイギリススリーウオットオンでJohn de Wotton Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1276年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアバンブリーで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ela Bisset(이)가 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 휘트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Biset(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Basset(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 보턴에서 John de Wotton I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 반버이에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ela Bisset nasceu em 1226, em Whitford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Biset, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice Basset, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Wotton I em 1241, em Wotton, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1276, em Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ela Bisset родилась в 1226 г. в местности уитфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Biset было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Basset, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Wotton I в 1241 г. в местности воттон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1276 г. в местности банбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ela Bisset nació en 1226, en Whitford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Biset, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice Basset, tenía 46 años. Se casó con John de Wotton I en 1241, en Wotton, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1276, en Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
